columns.extraction_plan: The control arm is "ADT alone" (or simply "ADT"). This is explicitly stated in the abstract on page 1: "Randomized phase 3 trial of ADT plus D versus ADT alone". It is also referred to as "ADT" in Table 1 on page 3 and Table 2 on page 4, and in the "Patients and methods" section on page 2: "Eligible patients were randomized in a 1:1 ratio to ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone."
